title: Company Names Tribunal decision: London Online Business School Limited
body: "Application number 5153  Applicant London Business School objected to the name used by London Online Business School Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of London Online Business School Limited is changed to 15390519, Ltd. "
